title: Transitions
content:
### Transition Component Vue provides a `` wrapper component for enter/leave animations: ```vue

Animated text

 ``` ### CSS Transition Classes Vue automatically applies CSS classes during transitions: | Class | Description | |---|---| | `.v-enter-from` | Starting state for enter | | `.v-enter-active` | Active state for enter (duration, easing) | | `.v-enter-to` | Ending state for enter | | `.v-leave-from` | Starting state for leave | | `.v-leave-active` | Active state for leave | | `.v-leave-to` | Ending state for leave | ```css .fade-enter-active, .fade-leave-active { transition: opacity 0.3s ease; } .fade-enter-from, .fade-leave-to { opacity: 0; } ``` Use the `name` prop to prefix classes: `` → `.fade-enter-active`. ### JavaScript Hooks ```vue

Content

 ``` ### Transition Modes - `out-in`: Current element leaves first, new element enters after - `in-out`: New element enters first, current leaves after ```vue

{{ currentView }}

 ``` ### Group Transitions `` animates multiple elements in a list: ```vue
  • {{ item.text }}
    • ``` `` adds `.v-move` class for smooth reordering animation.

quiz.question: Which Transition mode ensures the leaving element exits before the entering element appears?
Which component is used for animating multiple elements in a list?
